construction_type: Type IIA or IIIA depending height/area and jurisdiction

parti_config.stacking_logic: public low / secure-service internal / MEP stacked

plan_archetypes: shared public lobby with tenant clinic suites
building_type: Medical Office Building / Outpatient Specialty Clinic

sources.title: VA Lease Based Outpatient Clinics Design Guide
Time-Saver Standards for Building Types — Medical Offices, Dental Offices, Radiological Offices, Ophthalmological Offices

small.name: Specialty Clinic
small.notes: Exam module, imaging, waiting, staff support

medium.name: Medical Office Building
medium.notes: Multi-tenant specialists, shared lobby and diagnostics

large.name: Ambulatory Care Center
large.notes: Large outpatient platform with clinics, imaging, ASC or urgent care

ibc_primary_occupancy: B / I-2 outpatient areas by use and jurisdiction

space_library.name: Waiting
notes: Distributed waiting or centralized depending model

space_library.name: Exam / Consult Rooms
notes: Repeatable room module; may include procedure and consult mix

space_library.name: Provider Offices / Charting
notes: Shared workroom or dedicated offices depending specialty

space_library.name: Minor Procedure / Treatment
notes: Optional treatment room, urgent care, infusion, or specialty procedure

space_library.name: Public Restrooms
notes: Patient and visitor restrooms adjacent to waiting areas; ADA-compliant; sized per IPC fixture counts for outpatient occupancy.
